response.justification: While the candidate has 20 years of software engineering experience meeting the minimum tenure requirement, the role demands director-level strategic influence in AI/cloud platforms—a gap this profile does not address. Current seniority is Staff/Senior IC, not director-level; AI expertise is minimal (recent MCP tooling work only, no products or platforms built with AI); and there is no evidence of strategic product thinking or recognized expertise in AI. The resume shows broad technical versatility but lacks the specialized depth and seniority this Principal role requires.
strengths: Solid foundation with 20 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains
Demonstrated full-stack capability and ability to master new technical areas
Entrepreneurial experience and community leadership through GISCollective and technical education
concerns: Minimal AI/ML expertise—no demonstrated products, platforms, or deep knowledge in required domain
Current seniority (Staff/Senior IC) is below director-level requirement for principal role
Career trajectory shows breadth over depth in strategic areas; no evidence of cloud or AI product leadership
